message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[1600, \"B1|txX\", 50.0], [1600, \"B2|txX\", 50.0], [1500, \"B3|txY\", 25.0], [1600, \"B4|txZ\", 75.0], [1600, \"B4|txZ\", 75.0], [1700, \"B_nomark\", 30.0], [1600, \"txPlain\", 15.0]]","[[1400, 1499], [1500, 1600], [1600, 1600]]"],"focus":"Branch-prefixed IDs vs plain IDs, cross-branch duplicate canonicalization, same-timestamp node merging, out-of-order arrival, and exact/empty query ranges."},{"input_lines":["[[1000000, \"tx1\", 100.0], [1000000, \"tx2\", 200.0], [1000000, \"B1|tx3\", 300.0], [1000000, \"tx1\", 150.0], [1000000, \"B1|tx3\", 300.0], [1000000, \"TxCase\", 400.0], [999999, \"earlier\", 50.0]]","[[1000000, 1000000], [1000001, 1000002], [2000000, 1000000]]"],"focus":"All transactions share identical timestamps (single AVL node), duplicates among them, case-sensitivity, out-of-order earlier timestamp, and invalid (start>end) query handling."},{"input_lines":["[[50, \"a1\", 10.5], [40, \"b1\", 20.25], [45, \"c1\", 30.75], [45, \"c2\", 5.125], [60, \"d1\", 1000.0], [70, \"e1\", 2000.0], [-100, \"B9|neg\", 0.0], [80, \"dup\", 1.0], [90, \"dup\", 1.0]]","[[30, 60], [-200, 1000], [100, 200]]"],"focus":"Timestamps arranged to trigger AVL rotation patterns (LR/RR/LL/RL if implemented), negative timestamp and branch with 'B', high-precision amounts, and duplicate detection."}]}
